title: Plastic Bag
description: Hazy reverb-soaked psych pop with motorik undertones.

title: Heaven on the Faultline
description: Quiet-loud guitar dynamics, hushed female vocals over distorted chords.

title: Cold Cuts
description: Off-kilter rhythm, layered guitar textures, intimate vocal delivery.

title: Hounds of Love (live, bootleg)
description: Acapella-leaning post-punk reinterpretation of Kate Bush.

title: Yoke
description: 12-minute repetitive groove with flute and fuzz guitar.

title: Lola Bouncing
description: Sun-bleached groove, warm Rhodes, breathy vocals.

title: Andromeda
description: Karen Carpenter-esque vocals over orchestral pop.

title: Fyrhtu
description: Bone-rattling percussion and chanted Old Norse text.

title: Sirop de Glucose
description: Whispered French-language indie pop from Copenhagen.

title: Mardakht
description: Sufi poetry over downtempo electronics and dotar.

title: Doe Doe
description: Precise jazz fusion with synthesized horns and programmed drums.

title: How Strange, Innocence
description: Slow-building instrumental post-rock with twin guitar arpeggios.

title: Bekanntmachung
description: Sparse drum machine and deadpan German vocals.

title: Pano
description: Swedish-language acid folk with backwards guitar.

title: Aşk
description: Saz-driven Turkish psych rock with politically charged vocals.

title: Sealion
description: Hand-clap groove, Nina Simone interpolation, intimate folk-pop.

title: Bukatý
description: Garage-cumbia with Garifuna percussion and brass.

title: Le Coup du Vieux Crocodile
description: Long-form kosmische jam with looping saxophone and analog synth.

title: Vento d'Estate
description: Two Italian songwriters trading verses over breezy acoustic guitar.

title: Glass Eyes
description: St. Petersburg shoegaze band: wall of guitar with airy female vocals.

title: Sukhi
description: Hazy MPC beats with murmured introspective rap.

title: Salaam
description: Classic Hindi film playback singing with strings and tabla.

title: Tassili
description: Hypnotic Tuareg guitar with handclap rhythm.

title: Whirlwind
description: Glittering synth-pop with sidechained kick and bass groove.

title: Bryter Layter
description: Quiet fingerpicked acoustic guitar with woodwind arrangement.

title: Untrue
description: Crackle, pitched vocal cuts, rainy London atmosphere.

title: Pirouette
description: Punchy French electro with chopped vocal hook.

title: Yumeji's Theme
description: Waltz-time pizzicato strings, from In the Mood for Love.

title: Skeleton Tree
description: Sparse piano and synth pad with elegiac spoken vocal.

title: Hoshi
description: Solo piano with synthetic reverb and natural field recording.

title: Pneuma
description: Long-form prog metal with shifting time signatures.

title: Riad
description: Maghrebi vocal samples over deep techno.

title: Cherry-Coloured Funk
description: Chiming guitar, glossolalia vocals, gauzy production.

title: Cocoa Hooves
description: Tropical percussion under murmured falsetto.

title: Bocas en mi piel
description: Bossa-tinged downtempo with Spanish-language vocal.

title: Liturgy
description: Long arpeggiated sequence with slow harmonic shifts.

title: Tobacco Road
description: Heavy organ-driven psych blues from 1968.

title: Onirico
description: Off-kilter Italian indie with deadpan humor and toy instruments.

title: Bint el Chalabiya
description: Lebanese musical heritage: lush strings and crystalline vocal.

title: Pearl Diver
description: Lurching guitar pop with vivid, ambivalent lyrics.

title: Tjuvjakt
description: Stockholm street-ska with horns and shouted choruses.

title: Coro
description: Spanish-English bedroom pop with warm analog synth.

title: Garota Nacional
description: Late-90s Brazilian rock with reggae groove.

title: Tundra
description: Fractured break-beat with virtuoso fretless bass.

title: Eta Carinae
description: Vibraphone, Rhodes, and motorik drumming.

title: Apple Cider, I Don't Mind
description: Sunny Elephant 6-style indie pop with brass.

title: Aşk Tesadüfleri Sever
description: Lush Turkish pop ballad with sweeping strings.

title: Ölüm Allahın Emri
description: Fuzz-saturated Turkish psych with bağlama and wah-wah.

title: Skedaddle
description: Cinematic instrumental jazz-hop with Rhodes and live drums.

title: Glowed Up
description: Choppy half-time groove with chopped vocal hook.
